name: INVERT: The Climb
short_description: Embark on a journey to the moon in this rage inducing precision platformer with no checkpoints! You'll climb, fall, then cry and do it all again.
detailed_description:
No Updates

Unfortunately, I have lost the source code for this project. For that reason, there will be no future updates or content added. It won't be possible to fix any bugs too.


About the Game

INVERT: The Climb is a rage inducing precision platformer with no checkpoints.

  • Your Goal? To reach the moon! It's as easy as it sounds... ok maybe not.
  • How To Play? You can invert the map to show new paths or... fall down to the start. Your choice I guess...

GAMEPLAY

  • High Stakes Platforming: The only way to the moon is up, if you fall then that's on you.
  • Inverting: Invert the map to show new platforms but destroy old ones.
  • Experience All Emotions: The emotions you'll probably experience are happiness, satisfaction, peace, pride, heartbreak, anxiety, stress, confusion, frustration, that one emotion you experience when you throw your controller, a sense of being cheated, pain, and most importantly, rage.

FEATURES

  • All your progress is saved, both good and bad.
  • An addictive gameplay loop.
  • Online leaderboards based on fastest time.
